payment-outage.title: Payment Processing Outage Response
immediate_actions: Check Stripe dashboard status page: https://status.stripe.com
Verify payment-service pod health: kubectl get pods -n payments
Check payments-db connection pool: SELECT count(*) FROM pg_stat_activity
Review last 15min deploys: kubectl rollout history deployment/payment-service
investigation_steps: Check payment-service logs: kubectl logs -n payments -l app=payment-service --tail=500
Review Stripe webhook delivery failures in dashboard
Check database connection pool metrics in DataDog
Review recent code changes in payment-service repo
mitigation_options: Rollback payment-service deployment if recent deploy
Scale up payment-service replicas: kubectl scale deployment/payment-service --replicas=10
Restart stuck pods: kubectl delete pod -n payments -l app=payment-service
Enable circuit breaker to fail-fast instead of timeout

known_issues.solution: Restart payment-service pods to reset connections

known_issues.root_cause: Webhook handler timeout set too low
known_issues.solution: Increase webhook timeout to 30s in config

api-gateway-down.title: API Gateway Complete Outage
immediate_actions: Check AWS API Gateway metrics in CloudWatch
investigation_steps: Check API Gateway logs in CloudWatch
mitigation_options: Rollback recent API Gateway config changes
Failover to secondary API Gateway in different region

checkout-failures.title: Checkout Service Failures
immediate_actions: Check checkout-service error rate in DataDog
investigation_steps: Analyze error patterns: What error codes? Which endpoints?
Check database query performance for checkout tables
mitigation_options: Scale up replicas if under load

db-failover.title: Database Failover Procedure
investigation_steps: Identify root cause of primary failure

auth-outage.title: Authentication Service Outage
immediate_actions: Verify OAuth provider status (Auth0, Google, etc)
mitigation_options: Restart Redis cluster if connection issues
